query:
SELECT
            model AS "model!",
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS "requests!",
            COALESCE(SUM(tokens_used), 0)::bigint AS "tokens!",
            COALESCE(SUM(cost_microdollars), 0)::bigint AS "cost!"
          FROM ai_requests
          WHERE user_id = $1
            AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
          GROUP BY model
          ORDER BY SUM(tokens_used) DESC NULLS LAST
          LIMIT $2
